pages.raw_text:
If the average politician thinks
that the question of the ballot for
woman is not going to cut a figure
in this campaign he had better wise
up little on the political situation
The best political organization in
eastern Washington today is the
group of Spokane women directing
the campaign for equal suffrage.


They already have four speakers
in the field and are carrying on
their work with the men that listen
to political talks when delivered
from the heart out-the farmers and
union workingmen of the state. 1t
is among this class of voters, form.
ing the bulk of our population, that
the women eXpest to get support
and are receiving it.


While the women are not mixing
in the congressional, senatorial or
legislative campaigns they are
watching the men who aspire to fill
those places. And when a woman
goes home at night and registers a
kick with her partner about the
stand of Mr.. So and Co on the sui
frage question, such protest will
count, and don't you overlook it.
